title: ai-native-memory — the plugin's own frozen semantics
verify_note: tests/run.mjs (the full suite) is the CI entry point for this contract. verify-map.json points its oracle at tests/test-lib.mjs instead, because run.mjs enumerates and spawns every tests/test-*.mjs file including test-dogfood.mjs itself — pointing verify at run.mjs would make verify.mjs's self-verify step recurse into a process that (transitively) re-invokes verify.mjs. test-lib.mjs is a real, terminating, zero-dependency oracle that still proves the contract's machinery (canonicalize/sha256hex/contentAddress/finding/printFindings) is live.

exit_code_meaning.0: clean / GRANTED — no FAIL findings, or comprehension gate passed
exit_code_meaning.1: cannot-run — malformed input, unreadable file, or (gate.mjs only) authority hash drift
exit_code_meaning.2: findings present — audit.mjs or verify.mjs found at least one FAIL
exit_code_meaning.3: DENIED — gate.mjs comprehension check failed on at least one answer
